output.error_message: Got 436168 results, configured to fail if != 0

decision_log.decision: Parsed alert and queried DBT_RUN_RESULTS for error details
decision_log.rationale: Alert text contains test apex_participation_matches_participation_fact_enriched_12 from monitor__severe_tests__hourly DAG. DBT_RUN_RESULTS confirms test failure with 436168 unexpected results.

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, STATUS, MESSAGE, CREATED_AT, EXECUTION_TIME FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_RUN_RESULTS WHERE NAME = 'apex_participation_matches_participation_fact_enriched_12' AND STATUS = 'error' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
